whyNorthCyprus.title: The Mediterranean's Best-Kept Investment Secret
whyNorthCyprus.subtitle: Discover why savvy investors from London to Stockholm are choosing North Cyprus.

price.title: 2-3x Cheaper Than South Cyprus
price.description: Identical Mediterranean lifestyle at a fraction of the cost. Average villa prices start from £180,000.

residency.title: Easy Residency Permit
residency.description: No minimum investment required for residency — unlike Turkey's $200K threshold.

roi.title: 8-12% Annual Rental Yield
roi.description: Short-term rental demand is booming. Airbnb occupancy rates exceed 75% in peak season.

growth.title: 50-150% Growth Potential
growth.description: EU reunification talks could multiply property values. Early investors stand to benefit the most.

lifestyle.title: 340 Days of Sunshine
lifestyle.description: Year-round Mediterranean climate, pristine beaches, and a relaxed lifestyle.

infrastructure.title: Rapid Infrastructure Growth
infrastructure.description: New highways, marina projects, and international university campuses driving development.

investmentMap.title: Investment Performance Zones
investmentMap.subtitle: Not all regions are created equal. We analyze data from 15+ metrics to identify the highest performing micro-markets in North Cyprus.

iskele.name: Iskele (Long Beach)
iskele.description: The fastest growing investment zone. Short-term rental powerhouse with massive capital appreciation.

kyrenia.name: Kyrenia (City Center)
kyrenia.description: The crown jewel. High demand for luxury penthouses and historic properties with stable value.

esentepe.name: Esentepe / Tatlisu
esentepe.description: The 'New Riviera'. Perfect for secondary homes and high-end beachfront villa developments.

marketInsights.title: Data-Driven Wealth Creation
marketInsights.description: North Cyprus is currently positioned as the highest-growth property market in the Mediterranean for 2026. While Spain and Turkey face saturation, the TRNC offers a unique "early-entry" window with institutional-grade returns.
points: Zero property tax on capital gains after 5 years.
British Pound based transactions eliminating currency risk.
New Ercan International Airport doubling tourism capacity.
Consistent 15% YoY growth in luxury villa segment.
marketInsights.auditNote: All projects verified by Nexa Audit 2026

roiCalculator.title: Calculate Your Return on Investment
roiCalculator.subtitle: See how your investment in North Cyprus could grow over time.

results.disclaimer: * Projections are estimates based on current market data and are not guaranteed.

buyingProcess.title: How to Buy Property in North Cyprus
buyingProcess.subtitle: A transparent, step-by-step guide for international buyers.

1.title: Free Consultation
1.description: Share your requirements and budget. Our multilingual advisors will curate a shortlist tailored to you.

2.title: Property Viewing Tour
2.description: Visit North Cyprus for a VIP property tour or explore options via our immersive virtual tours.

3.title: Legal Due Diligence
3.description: Our partner lawyers verify title deeds, planning permissions, and all legal documentation.

4.title: Secure Your Property
4.description: Pay a refundable deposit to reserve. We handle contracts, permits, and government approvals.

5.title: Completion & Handover
5.description: Title deed transfer, utility connections, furnishing — we manage everything until you get the keys.
